visual_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dark, outdoor setting at night, a man in a sharp grey suit stands beside a car. He is illuminated by a single, harsh light source from the side, casting deep shadows. He looks down with a serious, intense expression as he fumbles with a small, dark object in his hands, which appears to be a lighter or a small electronic device. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character who appears to be preparing for something significant or dangerous.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays, building tension.)
